---
title: "About"
---

# About This Project

This website was created as part of the course **Statistical Programming 2** at **LMU Munich**.

The project investigates COVID-19 vaccination coverage in Germany and its relationship with COVID-19 mortality and ICU occupancy using publicly available data from **Our World in Data**.

## Authors

- Felix Obermaier
- Lukas Seibold

## Course Information

- Course: Statistical Programming 2
- Institution: Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München
- Semester: Summer Semester 2026

## Data Source

The data used in this project are provided by **Our World in Data**.

https://ourworldindata.org/coronavirus

## Software

This project was developed using

- R
- Quarto
- tidyverse
- ggplot2
- Git and GitHub

## Reproducibility

All analyses, figures, and tables shown on this website are generated directly from the source code contained in the GitHub repository.
